title: ctenitis equestris var. erosa
intro: Ctenitis equestris var. erosa, also known as the Horse Tail Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family, Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and promote healing. The health benefits of Ctenitis equestris var. erosa include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or tincture, can be made by infusing the leaves or stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
